tweets.topic: Euphoria Season 3 Episode 2 Release Time (India): When Will Euphoria 3 NEW Ep Drop Online? Where To Stream?
tweets.tweet: Euphoria Season 3 Episode 2 drops on HBO Max at 1:30 PM IST this Sunday, and you can stream it on Jio Cinema in India. Looks like the weekend just got a solid reason to stick around for some intense drama. #EuphoriaS3 #StreamingIndia

tweets.topic: Jio Hotstar to bring HBO Max to India, expands partnership with Warner Bros. Discovery
tweets.tweet: Jio TV+ is adding HBO Max content through an expanded partnership with Warner Bros. Discovery, bringing shows like Game of Thrones and Friends to Indian subscribers. This basically means your streaming options just got more interesting without needing another subscription app.

tweets.topic: Stocks to Watch for April 20: HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Jio Financial, Trent, Yes Bank, Hyundai and more
tweets.tweet: HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Jio Financial, Trent, Yes Bank, and Hyundai are on investors' radar for April 20 trading. If you've got money in the market, these are the ones worth keeping an eye on today. #StockMarket #IndianFinance

tweets.topic: Mukesh Ambani Net Worth, Biography, Business, Education, Financial Metrics, News
tweets.tweet: Mukesh Ambani's net worth crossed $100 billion, making him Asia's richest person with Reliance Industries driving most of his wealth. Pretty wild that one Indian entrepreneur built a conglomerate spanning telecom, energy, and retail that shaped how millions of us connect.

tweets.topic: Srinagar Court Denies Protection To Cable Operator Against JioStar, Cites Suppression Of Piracy FIR,...
tweets.tweet: Srinagar court rejected a cable operator's plea against JioStar, backing strict action on piracy after they allegedly suppressed an FIR. Good news for legal streaming — India's finally taking content protection seriously, which means better days ahead for creators and platform...

tweets.topic: JIO IPO DRHP expected in March: Reliance readies India’s largest public offer
tweets.tweet: Reliance is gearing up for Jio's IPO with the DRHP expected in March, what could be India's biggest public offering ever. This move might finally give retail investors a direct shot at owning a piece of India's telecom giant. #JioIPO #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Bharti Airtel leads gains as Sensex lifts ₹1,87,497.45 cr
tweets.tweet: Bharti Airtel's stock jumped as Sensex climbed to ₹1,87,497.45 cr in market gains today. Looks like telecom stocks are having a solid run — good news if you're watching Indian tech and telecom companies grow. #BhartiAirtel #IndianStocks

tweets.topic: Market recap: Eight of top 10 firms add Rs 1.87 lakh cr in mcap; Airtel biggest gainer
tweets.tweet: India's top 10 companies added a massive ₹1.87 lakh crore in market cap this week, with Airtel leading the charge as the biggest gainer. Looks like our telecom and tech giants are having quite the moment in the markets right now. #IndianMarkets #TechStocks

tweets.topic: Top Firms Gain Rs 1.87 Lakh Cr; Airtel Leads
tweets.tweet: Airtel topped the gains as India's top firms added ₹1.87 lakh crore in market value this quarter. Solid growth like this usually means telecom and tech stocks are doing well, which can be good news for your mutual fund portfolios. #IndianMarkets #Telecom

tweets.topic: Mcap of top 8 of 10 firms see value surge by ₹1.87 lakh crore; Airtel leads pack with ₹58,821 crore gain
tweets.tweet: Top 8 Indian firms just added ₹1.87 lakh crore in combined market value, with Airtel leading the charge at ₹58,821 crore gain. Looks like investor confidence in India's big tech and telecom plays is hitting new highs. #IndianTech #StockMarket
